Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix backend startup error: Add missing Optional import in rating_service

Resolves NameError caused by using Optional type hint without importing it from typing module.

Error fixed:
- be/app/services/rating_service.py:160: NameError: name 'Optional' is not defined

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cat > /tmp/botbot_test_v2.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

API_BASE="http://localhost:8000/api"
TEST_PHONE="13900139000"
TEST_PHONE2="13900139001"
TOKEN=""
USER_ID=""
TASK_ID=""
BID_ID=""
CONTRACT_ID=""

echo "======================================"
echo "BotBot 完整功能测试"
echo "测试时间: $\(date\)"
echo "======================================"
echo ""

# 1. 测试健康检查
echo "[1/20] 测试健康检查"
HEALTH=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/"\)
echo "响应: $HEALTH"
if echo "$HEALTH" | grep -q "BotBot API"; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "❌ 失败"
fi
echo ""

# 2. 测试发送验证码
echo "[2/20] 测试发送验证码"
SEND_CODE=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/auth/send-code" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{\\"phone_number\\": \\"${TEST_PHONE}\\"}"\)
echo "响应: $SEND_CODE"
if echo "$SEND_CODE" | grep -q "message"; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "❌ 失败"
fi
echo ""

# 3. 测试验证码登录
echo "[3/20] 测试验证码登录/注册"
LOGIN=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/auth/verify-code" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{\\"phone_number\\": \\"${TEST_PHONE}\\", \\"verification_code\\": \\"123456\\"}"\)
echo "响应: $LOGIN"
TOKEN=$\(echo $LOGIN | jq -r '.access_token // empty'\)
USER_ID=$\(echo $LOGIN | jq -r '.user_id // empty'\)
if [ ! -z "$TOKEN" ]; then
  echo "✅ 通过 - Token: ${TOKEN:0:30}..."
  echo "   用户ID: $USER_ID"
else
  echo "❌ 失败"
fi
echo ""

# 4. 测试获取当前用户信息
echo "[4/20] 测试获取当前用户信息"
ME=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/auth/me" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
echo "响应: $ME"
if echo "$ME" | grep -q "phone_number"; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "❌ 失败"
fi
echo ""

# 5. 测试更新用户资料
echo "[5/20] 测试更新用户资料"
UPDATE=$\(curl -s -X PATCH "${API_BASE}/users/me" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"nickname": "测试龙虾A", "bio": "我是一只聪明的AI龙虾"}'\)
echo "响应: $UPDATE"
if echo "$UPDATE" | grep -q "测试龙虾A"; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "❌ 失败"
fi
echo ""

# 6. 测试获取用户余额
echo "[6/20] 测试获取用户余额"
BALANCE=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/users/me/balance" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
echo "响应: $BALANCE"
if echo "$BALANCE" | grep -q "balance"; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "❌ 失败"
fi
echo ""

# 7. 测试创建任务
echo "[7/20] 测试创建任务"
CREATE_TASK=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/tasks" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "title": "开发一个React登录页面",
    "description": "需要使用React + TypeScript开发一个现代化的用户登录页面，包含表单验证、错误提示和响应式设计",
    "budget": 50,
    "deadline": "2026-03-25T23:59:59Z",
    "category": "前端开发",
    "tags": ["React", "TypeScript", "登录"]
  }'\)
echo "响应: $CREATE_TASK"
if echo "$CREATE_TASK" | grep -q "id\\|_id\\|task_id"; then
  TASK_ID=$\(echo $CREATE_TASK | jq -r '.id // ._id // .task_id // empty' | head -1\)
  echo "✅ 通过 - 任务ID: $TASK_ID"
else
  echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
fi
echo ""

# 8. 测试获取任务列表
echo "[8/20] 测试获取任务列表"
TASKS=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/tasks?limit=10" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
echo "响应: $TASKS"
if echo "$TASKS" | grep -q "tasks\\|\\["; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
fi
echo ""

# 9. 测试AI分析任务
echo "[9/20] 测试AI任务分析"
AI_ANALYSIS=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/ai/analyze-task" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "task_description": "开发一个React + TypeScript登录页面，需要表单验证和错误处理",
    "budget": 50,
    "user_level": "bronze"
  }'\)
echo "响应: $AI_ANALYSIS"
if echo "$AI_ANALYSIS" | grep -q "feasibility\\|recommendation"; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "❌ 失败或API key未配置"
fi
echo ""

# 10. 创建第二个用户
echo "[10/20] 创建第二个用户（用于竞标）"
curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/auth/send-code" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{\\"phone_number\\": \\"${TEST_PHONE2}\\"}" > /dev/null

LOGIN2=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/auth/verify-code" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{\\"phone_number\\": \\"${TEST_PHONE2}\\", \\"verification_code\\": \\"123456\\"}"\)
TOKEN2=$\(echo $LOGIN2 | jq -r '.access_token // empty'\)
USER_ID2=$\(echo $LOGIN2 | jq -r '.user_id // empty'\)
if [ ! -z "$TOKEN2" ]; then
  echo "✅ 通过 - 用户2 ID: $USER_ID2"
else
  echo "❌ 失败"
fi
echo ""

# 更新第二个用户资料
curl -s -X PATCH "${API_BASE}/users/me" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"nickname": "测试龙虾B", "bio": "我是接单专家"}' > /dev/null

# 11. 测试创建竞标
if [ ! -z "$TASK_ID" ] && [ "$TASK_ID" != "null" ] && [ ! -z "$TOKEN2" ]; then
  echo "[11/20] 测试创建竞标"
  CREATE_BID=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/bids" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}" \\
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
    -d "{
      \\"task_id\\": \\"${TASK_ID}\\",
      \\"amount\\": 45,
      \\"estimated_hours\\": 8,
      \\"proposal\\": \\"我有5年React开发经验，熟练TypeScript和表单验证，可以在3天内完成\\"
    }"\)
  echo "响应: $CREATE_BID"
  if echo "$CREATE_BID" | grep -q "id\\|_id\\|bid_id"; then
    BID_ID=$\(echo $CREATE_BID | jq -r '.id // ._id // .bid_id // empty' | head -1\)
    echo "✅ 通过 - 竞标ID: $BID_ID"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[11/20] ⏭️  跳过竞标测试（前置条件未满足）"
fi
echo ""

# 12. 测试获取任务的所有竞标
if [ ! -z "$TASK_ID" ] && [ "$TASK_ID" != "null" ]; then
  echo "[12/20] 测试获取任务的所有竞标"
  BIDS=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/tasks/${TASK_ID}/bids" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
  echo "响应: $BIDS"
  if echo "$BIDS" | grep -q "bids\\|\\["; then
    echo "✅ 通过"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[12/20] ⏭️  跳过"
fi
echo ""

# 13. 测试接受竞标并创建合同
if [ ! -z "$BID_ID" ] && [ "$BID_ID" != "null" ]; then
  echo "[13/20] 测试接受竞标并创建合同"
  ACCEPT_BID=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/bids/${BID_ID}/accept" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
  echo "响应: $ACCEPT_BID"
  if echo "$ACCEPT_BID" | grep -q "contract_id\\|id\\|_id"; then
    CONTRACT_ID=$\(echo $ACCEPT_BID | jq -r '.contract_id // .id // ._id // empty' | head -1\)
    echo "✅ 通过 - 合同ID: $CONTRACT_ID"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[13/20] ⏭️  跳过"
fi
echo ""

# 14. 测试获取合同详情
if [ ! -z "$CONTRACT_ID" ] && [ "$CONTRACT_ID" != "null" ]; then
  echo "[14/20] 测试获取合同详情"
  CONTRACT=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/contracts/${CONTRACT_ID}" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
  echo "响应: $CONTRACT"
  if echo "$CONTRACT" | grep -q "task_id\\|publisher_id"; then
    echo "✅ 通过"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[14/20] ⏭️  跳过"
fi
echo ""

# 15. 测试提交任务成果
if [ ! -z "$CONTRACT_ID" ] && [ "$CONTRACT_ID" != "null" ]; then
  echo "[15/20] 测试提交任务成果"
  SUBMIT=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/contracts/${CONTRACT_ID}/submit" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}" \\
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
    -d '{
      "deliverable_url": "https://github.com/test-lobster/login-page-demo",
      "notes": "已完成开发，包含完整的表单验证、错误提示和响应式设计。测试账号: demo/demo123"
    }'\)
  echo "响应: $SUBMIT"
  if echo "$SUBMIT" | grep -q "success\\|submitted\\|delivered"; then
    echo "✅ 通过"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[15/20] ⏭️  跳过"
fi
echo ""

# 16. 测试确认完成
if [ ! -z "$CONTRACT_ID" ] && [ "$CONTRACT_ID" != "null" ]; then
  echo "[16/20] 测试确认完成（发布者验收）"
  COMPLETE=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/contracts/${CONTRACT_ID}/complete" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
  echo "响应: $COMPLETE"
  if echo "$COMPLETE" | grep -q "success\\|completed"; then
    echo "✅ 通过"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[16/20] ⏭️  跳过"
fi
echo ""

# 17. 测试发布者评分
if [ ! -z "$CONTRACT_ID" ] && [ "$CONTRACT_ID" != "null" ]; then
  echo "[17/20] 测试发布者对接单者评分"
  RATE1=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/ratings" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}" \\
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
    -d "{
      \\"contract_id\\": \\"${CONTRACT_ID}\\",
      \\"quality_score\\": 5,
      \\"communication_score\\": 5,
      \\"timeliness_score\\": 5,
      \\"comment\\": \\"完成得非常好！代码质量高，沟通及时，提前交付\\"
    }"\)
  echo "响应: $RATE1"
  if echo "$RATE1" | grep -q "id\\|_id\\|rating_id\\|success"; then
    echo "✅ 通过"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[17/20] ⏭️  跳过"
fi
echo ""

# 18. 测试接单者评分
if [ ! -z "$CONTRACT_ID" ] && [ "$CONTRACT_ID" != "null" ]; then
  echo "[18/20] 测试接单者对发布者评分"
  RATE2=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/ratings" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}" \\
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
    -d "{
      \\"contract_id\\": \\"${CONTRACT_ID}\\",
      \\"quality_score\\": 5,
      \\"communication_score\\": 5,
      \\"timeliness_score\\": 5,
      \\"comment\\": \\"需求描述清晰，沟通顺畅，付款及时\\"
    }"\)
  echo "响应: $RATE2"
  if echo "$RATE2" | grep -q "id\\|_id\\|rating_id\\|success"; then
    echo "✅ 通过"
  else
    echo "⚠️  可能失败或路由未实现"
  fi
else
  echo "[18/20] ⏭️  跳过"
fi
echo ""

# 19. 测试获取用户评分历史
echo "[19/20] 测试获取用户评分历史"
RATINGS=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/users/me/ratings" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}"\)
echo "响应: $RATINGS"
if echo "$RATINGS" | grep -q "ratings\\|received_ratings\\|\\["; then
  echo "✅ 通过"
else
  echo "⚠️  路由不存在或未实现"
fi
echo ""

# 20. 测试token刷新
echo "[20/20] 测试Token刷新"
REFRESH_TOKEN=$\(echo $LOGIN | jq -r '.refresh_token // empty'\)
if [ ! -z "$REFRESH_TOKEN" ]; then
  REFRESH=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/auth/refresh" \\
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
    -d "{\\"refresh_token\\": \\"${REFRESH_TOKEN}\\"}"\)
  echo "响应: $REFRESH"
  if echo "$REFRESH" | grep -q "access_token"; then
    echo "✅ 通过"
  else
    echo "❌ 失败"
  fi
else
  echo "⏭️  跳过（无refresh token）"
fi
echo ""

# 额外：测试无效token
echo "[额外] 测试无效Token访问（安全测试）"
INVALID=$\(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" -X GET "${API_BASE}/auth/me" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer invalid_token_12345"\)
if echo "$INVALID" | grep -q "HTTP_CODE:401"; then
  echo "✅ 通过 - 正确拒绝无效token"
else
  echo "❌ 失败 - 安全问题"
fi
echo ""

# 额外：测试未授权访问
echo "[额外] 测试未授权访问（安全测试）"
UNAUTH=$\(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" -X GET "${API_BASE}/users/me"\)
if echo "$UNAUTH" | grep -q "HTTP_CODE:401\\|HTTP_CODE:403"; then
  echo "✅ 通过 - 正确要求认证"
else
  echo "⚠️  需要检查认证中间件"
fi
echo ""

echo "======================================"
echo "测试完成"
echo "======================================"
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/botbot_test_v2.sh
bash /tmp/botbot_test_v2.sh 2>&1 | tee /tmp/botbot_test_output.txt)

Bash(cat > /tmp/full_test.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

API_BASE="http://localhost:8000/api"

echo "======================================"
echo "BotBot 完整业务流程测试"
echo "======================================"
echo ""

# 1. 创建两个用户
echo "[1] 创建发布者用户"
LOGIN1=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/auth/direct-login" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"phone_number": "13900139401"}'\)
TOKEN1=$\(echo $LOGIN1 | jq -r '.access_token'\)
USER1=$\(echo $LOGIN1 | jq -r '.user_id'\)
echo "   发布者ID: $USER1"

echo "[2] 创建接单者用户"
LOGIN2=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/auth/direct-login" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"phone_number": "13900139402"}'\)
TOKEN2=$\(echo $LOGIN2 | jq -r '.access_token'\)
USER2=$\(echo $LOGIN2 | jq -r '.user_id'\)
echo "   接单者ID: $USER2"
echo ""

# 2. 发布者创建任务
echo "[3] 发布者创建任务（预算50kg）"
TASK=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/tasks/" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN1}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "title": "开发React登录页面",
    "description": "使用React + TypeScript开发现代化登录页面，需要表单验证、错误提示和响应式设计",
    "budget": 50,
    "category": "前端开发",
    "tags": ["React", "TypeScript"]
  }'\)
TASK_ID=$\(echo "$TASK" | jq -r '.id // ._id'\)
echo "   任务ID: $TASK_ID"
echo "   任务标题: $\(echo $TASK | jq -r '.title'\)"
echo ""

# 3. 接单者竞标
echo "[4] 接单者创建竞标（45kg）"
BID=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/bids/" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{
    \\"task_id\\": \\"${TASK_ID}\\",
    \\"amount\\": 45,
    \\"estimated_hours\\": 8,
    \\"proposal\\": \\"我有5年React开发经验，可以高质量完成\\"
  }"\)
BID_ID=$\(echo "$BID" | jq -r '.id // ._id'\)
echo "   竞标ID: $BID_ID"
echo "   竞标金额: $\(echo $BID | jq -r '.amount'\)kg"
echo ""

# 4. 查看任务竞标列表
echo "[5] 查看任务的所有竞标"
BIDS=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/tasks/${TASK_ID}/bids" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN1}"\)
echo "   竞标数量: $\(echo $BIDS | jq -r '.total'\)"
echo ""

# 5. 发布者接受竞标
echo "[6] 发布者接受竞标并创建合同"
ACCEPT=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/bids/${BID_ID}/accept" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN1}"\)
CONTRACT_ID=$\(echo $ACCEPT | jq -r '.contract_id'\)
echo "   合同ID: $CONTRACT_ID"
echo ""

# 6. 查看合同详情
echo "[7] 查看合同详情"
CONTRACT=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/contracts/${CONTRACT_ID}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN1}"\)
echo "   合同状态: $\(echo $CONTRACT | jq -r '.status'\)"
echo "   合同金额: $\(echo $CONTRACT | jq -r '.amount'\)kg"
echo ""

# 7. 接单者提交成果
echo "[8] 接单者提交成果"
SUBMIT=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/contracts/${CONTRACT_ID}/submit" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "deliverable_url": "https://github.com/test/login-page",
    "notes": "已完成开发，包含完整的表单验证和响应式设计"
  }'\)
echo "   提交状态: $\(echo $SUBMIT | jq -r '.deliverables_submitted'\)"
echo ""

# 8. 发布者确认完成
echo "[9] 发布者确认完成"
COMPLETE=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/contracts/${CONTRACT_ID}/complete" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN1}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"approved": true}'\)
echo "   完成状态: $\(echo $COMPLETE | jq -r '.status'\)"
echo ""

# 9. 双方互评
echo "[10] 发布者评价接单者"
RATE1=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/ratings/" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN1}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{
    \\"contract_id\\": \\"${CONTRACT_ID}\\",
    \\"quality_score\\": 5,
    \\"communication_score\\": 5,
    \\"timeliness_score\\": 5,
    \\"comment\\": \\"完成得非常好，代码质量高\\"
  }"\)
echo "   评分ID: $\(echo $RATE1 | jq -r '.id // ._id'\)"

echo "[11] 接单者评价发布者"
RATE2=$\(curl -s -X POST "${API_BASE}/ratings/" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{
    \\"contract_id\\": \\"${CONTRACT_ID}\\",
    \\"quality_score\\": 5,
    \\"communication_score\\": 5,
    \\"timeliness_score\\": 5,
    \\"comment\\": \\"需求清晰，沟通顺畅\\"
  }"\)
echo "   评分ID: $\(echo $RATE2 | jq -r '.id // ._id'\)"
echo ""

# 10. 查看最终状态
echo "[12] 查看发布者最终余额"
BALANCE1=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/users/me/balance" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN1}"\)
echo "   可用: $\(echo $BALANCE1 | jq -r '.balance'\)kg"
echo "   冻结: $\(echo $BALANCE1 | jq -r '.frozen'\)kg"

echo "[13] 查看接单者最终余额"
BALANCE2=$\(curl -s -X GET "${API_BASE}/users/me/balance" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN2}"\)
echo "   可用: $\(echo $BALANCE2 | jq -r '.balance'\)kg"
echo "   冻结: $\(echo $BALANCE2 | jq -r '.frozen'\)kg"
echo ""

echo "======================================"
echo "测试完成！"
echo "======================================"
EOF

bash /tmp/full_test.sh)
